requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — PSQCA PS Standards (CISPR 32 / IEC 61000-3 Aligned)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC发射——PSQCA PS标准（对标CISPR 32 / IEC 61000-3）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC發射——PSQCA PS標準（對標CISPR 32 / IEC 61000-3）

summary.en: Pakistan's EMC framework for electromagnetic emissions is administered by PSQCA (Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority), which publishes PS (Pakistan Standards) that adopt IEC and CISPR international standards. For multimedia and IT equipment including wireless devices, the applicable PS standard aligns with CISPR 32 (Multimedia equipment — Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements and limits) for radiated and conducted emissions, and with IEC 61000-3-2 and IEC 61000-3-3 for harmonic current emissions and voltage fluctuations. PSQCA may require products to be tested to applicable PS standards as a condition of market entry or import. Importers are responsible for ensuring PSQCA PS compliance. The PSQCA enforcement posture and specific PS standard numbers in force should be verified with a licensed Pakistani importer, as Pakistan's standards adoption timeline can lag IEC publication. Products bearing a PS mark (Pakistan Standards mark) have been assessed by PSQCA.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦的EMC发射框架由PSQCA（巴基斯坦标准与质量控制局）管理，PSQCA发布采用IEC和CISPR国际标准的PS（巴基斯坦标准）。对于包括无线设备在内的多媒体及IT设备，适用PS标准与CISPR 32（多媒体设备——电磁骚扰——要求和限值）在辐射和传导发射方面接轨，并与IEC 61000-3-2和IEC 61000-3-3在谐波电流发射及电压波动方面接轨。PSQCA可要求产品依据适用PS标准进行测试，作为市场准入或进口条件。进口商负责确保PSQCA PS合规。PSQCA的执法立场及现行PS标准编号应向持证巴基斯坦进口商核实，因为巴基斯坦的标准采用时间线可能落后于IEC发布。带有PS标志（巴基斯坦标准标志）的产品已经PSQCA评定。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦的EMC發射框架由PSQCA（巴基斯坦標準與質量控制局）管理，PSQCA發布採用IEC和CISPR國際標準的PS（巴基斯坦標準）。對於包括無線設備在內的多媒體及IT設備，適用PS標準與CISPR 32（多媒體設備——電磁騷擾——要求和限值）在輻射和傳導發射方面接軌，並與IEC 61000-3-2和IEC 61000-3-3在諧波電流發射及電壓波動方面接軌。PSQCA可要求產品依據適用PS標準進行測試，作為市場准入或進口條件。進口商負責確保PSQCA PS合規。PSQCA的執法立場及現行PS標準編號應向持牌巴基斯坦進口商核實，因為巴基斯坦的標準採用時間線可能落後於IEC發布。帶有PS標誌（巴基斯坦標準標誌）的產品已經PSQCA評定。

standards_or_laws: PSQCA PS standards aligned with CISPR 32 — Multimedia equipment: Electromagnetic disturbances — Requirements and limits
PSQCA PS standards aligned with IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions
PSQCA PS standards aligned with IEC 61000-3-3 — Limitation of voltage changes and flicker

summary.en: China's EMC emissions requirements for IT and multimedia equipment are covered by GB/T 9254 (aligned with CISPR 22/32 — Information technology equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics, limits and methods of measurement) and GB 17625.1 (aligned with IEC 61000-3-2 — Limits for harmonic current emissions). Products within CCC scope with EMC requirements must be certified to these GB standards before sale in China. CISPR 32-aligned GB/T 9254 testing may provide a useful baseline for PSQCA PS testing requirements, as both adopt the same CISPR parent standard, but separate PS-standard testing and PSQCA assessment are required for Pakistan market access.
summary.zh: 中国IT及多媒体设备的EMC发射要求由GB/T 9254（与CISPR 22/32接轨——信息技术设备无线电骚扰限值和测量方法）和GB 17625.1（与IEC 61000-3-2接轨——谐波电流发射限值）覆盖。纳入CCC范围且含EMC要求的产品在华销售前须依据上述GB标准进行认证。与CISPR 32接轨的GB/T 9254测试可为PSQCA PS测试要求提供有用基准，因为两者均采用相同的CISPR母标准，但进入巴基斯坦市场仍须进行单独的PS标准测试和PSQCA评定。
summary.zht: 中國IT及多媒體設備的EMC發射要求由GB/T 9254（與CISPR 22/32接軌——信息技術設備無線電騷擾限值和測量方法）和GB 17625.1（與IEC 61000-3-2接軌——諧波電流發射限值）覆蓋。納入CCC範圍且含EMC要求的產品在華銷售前須依據上述GB標準進行認證。與CISPR 32接軌的GB/T 9254測試可為PSQCA PS測試要求提供有用基準，因為兩者均採用相同的CISPR母標準，但進入巴基斯坦市場仍須進行單獨的PS標準測試和PSQCA評定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 — Information technology equipment: Radio disturbance characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC/MIIT, aligned with CISPR 22/32)
GB 17625.1 — Limits for harmonic current emissions (IEC 61000-3-2 aligned, mandatory CCC for in-scope products)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports and CCC EMC certificates are based on the same CISPR parent standard family as PSQCA PS, which may reduce re-testing scope, but they do not satisfy PSQCA PS requirements directly — a Pakistan-market test report against applicable PS standard limits, from a PSQCA-accepted laboratory, is required. The exact PS standard number and version in force should be verified with PSQCA or a licensed Pakistani importer before testing. PSQCA enforcement intensity varies by product category and year of import; importers should obtain a PS compliance assessment to avoid customs holds.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254检测报告和CCC EMC证书基于与PSQCA PS相同的CISPR母标准体系，可能减少重新测试的范围，但不能直接满足PSQCA PS要求——须提供来自PSQCA认可实验室、符合适用PS标准限值的巴基斯坦市场测试报告。在测试前，应向PSQCA或持证巴基斯坦进口商核实现行PS标准编号及版本。PSQCA执法强度因产品类别和进口年份而异；进口商应取得PS合规评定，以避免海关扣押。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254檢測報告和CCC EMC證書基於與PSQCA PS相同的CISPR母標準體系，可能減少重新測試的範圍，但不能直接滿足PSQCA PS要求——須提供來自PSQCA認可實驗室、符合適用PS標準限值的巴基斯坦市場測試報告。在測試前，應向PSQCA或持牌巴基斯坦進口商核實現行PS標準編號及版本。PSQCA執法強度因產品類別和進口年份而異；進口商應取得PS合規評定，以避免海關扣押。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (under PSQCA authority) — PS standard compliance required for applicable product categories; enforcement intensity by category should be verified with a licensed Pakistani importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for CCC-scope products with EMC requirements) — GB/T 9254 and GB 17625.1 compliance under SAC/MIIT and CNCA framework

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] PSQCA PS-standard EMC emissions compliance is required for wireless and IT devices entering Pakistan. Chinese GB/T 9254 test data may serve as a partial baseline given shared CISPR lineage, but a separate Pakistan PS-standard test report is required for PSQCA compliance. Verify current PS standard numbers and PSQCA enforcement requirements with a licensed Pakistani importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] PSQCA PS标准EMC发射合规是进入巴基斯坦的无线及IT设备的要求。鉴于共同的CISPR来源，中国GB/T 9254测试数据可作为部分基准，但PSQCA合规仍须提供单独的巴基斯坦PS标准测试报告。发货前应向持证巴基斯坦进口商核实现行PS标准编号及PSQCA执法要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] PSQCA PS標準EMC發射合規是進入巴基斯坦的無線及IT設備的要求。鑑於共同的CISPR來源，中國GB/T 9254測試數據可作為部分基準，但PSQCA合規仍須提供單獨的巴基斯坦PS標準測試報告。發貨前應向持牌巴基斯坦進口商核實現行PS標準編號及PSQCA執法要求。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — PSQCA PS Standards (IEC 61000-4 Series Aligned)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC抗扰度——PSQCA PS标准（对标IEC 61000-4系列）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC抗擾度——PSQCA PS標準（對標IEC 61000-4系列）

summary.en: Pakistan's PSQCA publishes PS immunity standards aligned with the IEC 61000-4 series, covering electrostatic discharge (ESD, IEC 61000-4-2), electrical fast transient / burst (EFT/Burst, IEC 61000-4-4), surge (IEC 61000-4-5), conducted disturbances (IEC 61000-4-6), radiated RF immunity (IEC 61000-4-3), and power-frequency magnetic field (IEC 61000-4-8). For wireless and IoT devices sold in Pakistan, importers are responsible for demonstrating PS immunity compliance through testing at an accepted laboratory. Pakistan's 220-240 V / 50 Hz electrical environment (with mixed plug types C/D/G/M and frequent voltage fluctuations) means surge and EFT immunity levels in the IEC 61000-4 series are directly relevant. Specific PS standard numbers in force should be verified with PSQCA or a licensed Pakistani importer.
summary.zh: 巴基斯坦PSQCA发布与IEC 61000-4系列接轨的PS抗扰度标准，涵盖静电放电（ESD，IEC 61000-4-2）、电快速瞬变/脉冲群（EFT/Burst，IEC 61000-4-4）、浪涌（IEC 61000-4-5）、传导骚扰（IEC 61000-4-6）、辐射射频抗扰度（IEC 61000-4-3）及工频磁场（IEC 61000-4-8）。对于在巴基斯坦销售的无线及物联网设备，进口商负责通过认可实验室的测试证明PS抗扰度合规。巴基斯坦220-240V/50Hz电气环境（混合插头类型C/D/G/M，且电压波动频繁）意味着IEC 61000-4系列的浪涌和EFT抗扰度等级直接相关。现行PS标准编号应向PSQCA或持证巴基斯坦进口商核实。
summary.zht: 巴基斯坦PSQCA發布與IEC 61000-4系列接軌的PS抗擾度標準，涵蓋靜電放電（ESD，IEC 61000-4-2）、電快速瞬變/脈衝群（EFT/Burst，IEC 61000-4-4）、浪湧（IEC 61000-4-5）、傳導騷擾（IEC 61000-4-6）、輻射射頻抗擾度（IEC 61000-4-3）及工頻磁場（IEC 61000-4-8）。對於在巴基斯坦銷售的無線及物聯網設備，進口商負責通過認可實驗室的測試證明PS抗擾度合規。巴基斯坦220-240V/50Hz電氣環境（混合插頭類型C/D/G/M，且電壓波動頻繁）意味著IEC 61000-4系列的浪湧和EFT抗擾度等級直接相關。現行PS標準編號應向PSQCA或持牌巴基斯坦進口商核實。

standards_or_laws: PSQCA PS standards aligned with IEC 61000-4-2 — ESD immunity
PSQCA PS standards aligned with IEC 61000-4-3 — Radiated RF immunity
PSQCA PS standards aligned with IEC 61000-4-4 — EFT/Burst immunity
PSQCA PS standards aligned with IEC 61000-4-5 — Surge immunity
PSQCA PS standards aligned with IEC 61000-4-6 — Conducted RF disturbance immunity

summary.en: China's immunity requirements are covered by the GB/T 17626 series (aligned with IEC 61000-4 series), including GB/T 17626.2 (ESD), GB/T 17626.3 (radiated RF), GB/T 17626.4 (EFT/Burst), GB/T 17626.5 (surge), and GB/T 17626.6 (conducted RF). For CCC-scope products, immunity testing to GB/T 17626 standards is part of the certification process. GB/T 17626-series test reports may provide useful technical data given their alignment with IEC 61000-4, but separate PS-standard immunity assessment for Pakistan market access is required.
summary.zh: 中国的抗扰度要求由GB/T 17626系列（与IEC 61000-4系列接轨）覆盖，包括GB/T 17626.2（ESD）、GB/T 17626.3（辐射射频）、GB/T 17626.4（EFT/Burst）、GB/T 17626.5（浪涌）和GB/T 17626.6（传导射频）。对于纳入CCC范围的产品，依据GB/T 17626标准的抗扰度测试是认证过程的组成部分。鉴于GB/T 17626系列与IEC 61000-4接轨，相关测试报告可提供有用的技术数据，但进入巴基斯坦市场仍须进行单独的PS标准抗扰度评定。
summary.zht: 中國的抗擾度要求由GB/T 17626系列（與IEC 61000-4系列接軌）覆蓋，包括GB/T 17626.2（ESD）、GB/T 17626.3（輻射射頻）、GB/T 17626.4（EFT/Burst）、GB/T 17626.5（浪湧）和GB/T 17626.6（傳導射頻）。對於納入CCC範圍的產品，依據GB/T 17626標準的抗擾度測試是認證過程的組成部分。鑑於GB/T 17626系列與IEC 61000-4接軌，相關測試報告可提供有用的技術數據，但進入巴基斯坦市場仍須進行單獨的PS標準抗擾度評定。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series — Electromagnetic compatibility: Testing and measurement techniques (IEC 61000-4 series aligned, SAC/MIIT)

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 17626 immunity test reports and CCC immunity certification are based on IEC 61000-4, the same parent series as PSQCA PS immunity standards, which may reduce re-testing scope. However, Pakistan's 220-240 V / 50 Hz grid environment (with frequent voltage sags and brownouts) means that surge and EFT immunity is particularly important. Products designed for China's 220 V / 50 Hz grid share the same nominal voltage, but must still comply with Pakistani PS immunity limits and the importer must hold compliant test documentation for PSQCA purposes.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17626抗扰度测试报告和CCC抗扰度认证基于IEC 61000-4，与PSQCA PS抗扰度标准属同一母系列，可能减少重新测试的范围。然而，巴基斯坦220-240V/50Hz电网环境（频繁出现电压暂降和欠压）意味着浪涌和EFT抗扰度尤为重要。针对中国220V/50Hz电网设计的产品虽具有相同标称电压，但仍须符合巴基斯坦PS抗扰度限值，进口商须为PSQCA目的持有合规测试文件。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17626抗擾度測試報告和CCC抗擾度認證基於IEC 61000-4，與PSQCA PS抗擾度標準屬同一母系列，可能減少重新測試的範圍。然而，巴基斯坦220-240V/50Hz電網環境（頻繁出現電壓暫降和欠壓）意味著浪湧和EFT抗擾度尤為重要。針對中國220V/50Hz電網設計的產品雖具有相同標稱電壓，但仍須符合巴基斯坦PS抗擾度限值，進口商須為PSQCA目的持有合規測試文件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (under PSQCA authority for applicable categories) — PS immunity standard compliance required; specific requirements should be verified with PSQCA or a licensed Pakistani importer
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for CCC-scope products) — GB/T 17626 series immunity compliance under CNCA/SAC framework

source.publisher: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] PSQCA PS immunity standards (IEC 61000-4 aligned) apply to wireless and IT devices imported into Pakistan. Chinese GB/T 17626 test data shares IEC 61000-4 lineage and may reduce re-testing scope. Pakistan's 220-240 V / 50 Hz grid with frequent voltage fluctuations makes surge and EFT immunity particularly relevant. Verify current PS standard numbers and PSQCA requirements with a licensed Pakistani importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] PSQCA PS抗扰度标准（与IEC 61000-4接轨）适用于进口到巴基斯坦的无线及IT设备。中国GB/T 17626测试数据与IEC 61000-4同源，可能减少重新测试的范围。巴基斯坦220-240V/50Hz电网频繁出现电压波动，使得浪涌和EFT抗扰度尤为重要。发货前应向持证巴基斯坦进口商核实现行PS标准编号及PSQCA要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] PSQCA PS抗擾度標準（與IEC 61000-4接軌）適用於進口到巴基斯坦的無線及IT設備。中國GB/T 17626測試數據與IEC 61000-4同源，可能減少重新測試的範圍。巴基斯坦220-240V/50Hz電網頻繁出現電壓波動，使得浪湧和EFT抗擾度尤為重要。發貨前應向持牌巴基斯坦進口商核實現行PS標準編號及PSQCA要求。
